name: ChaunyOMS
description: Authoritative OpenClaw memory and contextEngine substrate backed by ChaunyOMS SQLite. Markdown is export-only, never a runtime fact source.

dataDir.description: Directory for ChaunyOMS runtime data. Defaults to sharedDataDir/data/chaunyoms.

agentId.description: Canonical agent identity used for long-term memory boundaries.

configPreset.description: Named config preset. Safe reduces automation, balanced keeps current defaults, enhanced_recall enables stronger retrieval helpers.

workspaceDir.description: OpenClaw workspace directory used for navigation snapshots and project-local runtime state.

sharedDataDir.description: Shared data root for unified knowledge indexes, shared cognition, and plugin support files.

memoryVaultDir.description: Optional human-readable Markdown export/stub root. Defaults to sharedDataDir/vaults/chaunyoms; SQLite remains the runtime memory source.

knowledgeBaseDir.description: Optional human-readable/export knowledge directory. It is never scanned as the AI runtime fact source in authoritative OMS mode.

enableTools.description: Register the standard ChaunyOMS tool surface: memory_retrieve plus raw/source trace utilities.

mode.description: OpenClaw compatibility enforcement mode. authoritative fail-fasts when OpenClaw native memory slots/plugins would create a second fact source.

openClawCompatibilityMode.description: Alias for mode, kept for explicit OpenClaw compatibility configuration.

contextWindow.description: Maximum context budget seen by the plugin.

strictCompaction.description: Require the host LLM for summary generation. When true, summary, rollup, and knowledge-promotion writes stop instead of degrading to non-LLM output.

compactionBarrierEnabled.description: When true, compaction runs before assemble continues whenever pressure crosses the trigger threshold.

freshTailTokens.description: Token budget reserved for fresh uncompressed tail messages.

maxFreshTailTurns.description: Maximum number of recent turns protected from compaction.

compactionBatchTurns.description: Maximum number of turn ranges considered in one compaction pass.

summaryMaxOutputTokens.description: Maximum output tokens for summary generation.

runtimeCaptureEnabled.description: Enable runtime message capture from host payloads.

autoRecallEnabled.description: Allow automatic source recall when the route requires historical detail.

agentVaultMirrorEnabled.description: Enable optional AgentVault human-readable Markdown mirrors. Disabled by default; SQLite remains the only authoritative runtime source.

summaryMarkdownMirrorEnabled.description: Write per-summary AgentVault Markdown files when agentVaultMirrorEnabled is also true. Disabled by default.

memoryItemMarkdownMirrorEnabled.description: Write MemoryItem AgentVault Markdown mirror files when agentVaultMirrorEnabled is also true. Disabled by default.

transcriptMirrorEnabled.description: Write transcript AgentVault Markdown mirrors when agentVaultMirrorEnabled is also true. Disabled by default.

knowledgeMarkdownEnabled.description: Opt in to curated KnowledgeMarkdownStore export/index maintenance. Disabled by default in the final shape; Markdown never becomes a runtime fact source.

retrievalStrength.description: Single retrieval policy knob aligned with model effort naming. low is light, medium is balanced/default, high requires source-backed answers, xhigh opens heavy retrieval lanes including RAG/Graph/Rerank, and custom honors explicit lane toggles.

llmPlannerMode.description: On-demand LLMPlanner mode. auto makes the planner the retrieval scheduling backbone when ambiguity/risk warrants it; shadow records planner intent without selecting it; off uses deterministic routing only.

plannerDebugEnabled.description: Expose additional planner diagnostics for oms_planner_debug and retrieval envelopes.

llmPlannerModel.description: Optional model name for the LLMPlanner scheduling call. Omitted to use the host default.

kbCandidateEnabled.description: Allow ChaunyOMS to create governed knowledge-base candidates. Candidate creation is separate from Markdown writes.

kbWriteEnabled.description: Allow ChaunyOMS to write eligible knowledge to the human-readable flat vault. Disabled by default.

kbPromotionMode.description: Knowledge-vault promotion mode. manual/assisted are recommended defaults.

kbPromotionStrictness.description: Screening strictness for knowledge-vault promotion candidates.

kbExportEnabled.description: Enable explicit flat-vault Markdown export. Markdown remains a human-facing output, not an AI runtime fact source.

knowledgePromotionEnabled.description: Enable promotion from accepted knowledge raw into the unified knowledge store. Disabled by default.

knowledgePromotionManualReviewEnabled.description: Require accepted knowledge raw candidates to wait in a scored manual review queue before Markdown promotion. Default true, so enabling knowledge promotion stays review-first unless explicitly relaxed.

knowledgeIntakeMode.description: Knowledge intake strictness before accepted summaries enter knowledge raw.

knowledgeIntakeAllowProjectState.description: Allow project_state summaries to enter knowledge raw more easily.

knowledgeIntakeAllowBranchSummaries.description: Allow branch/rollup summaries to enter knowledge raw.

knowledgeIntakeUserOverrideEnabled.description: Allow explicit user 'remember/store this' intent to bypass the normal knowledge intake gate.

knowledgeIntakeUserOverridePatterns.description: Additional literal phrases that should count as explicit user knowledge-intake override signals.

semanticCandidateExpansionEnabled.description: Allow heuristic/semantic candidate expansion to propose authoritative follow-up retrieval paths.

semanticCandidateLimit.description: Maximum number of semantic candidates to surface in retrieval diagnostics.

usageFeedbackEnabled.description: Record bounded recall usage feedback events/stats. Default true and safe to disable.

brainPackEnabled.description: Enable Git-safe BrainPack projection support. SQLite remains the runtime source of truth.

brainPackMode.description: BrainPack trigger mode. manual is the default; scheduled evaluates turn/interval gates.

brainPackTurnInterval.description: Conversation-turn interval for scheduled BrainPack snapshots. Default 500.

brainPackIntervalHours.description: Wall-clock interval in hours for scheduled BrainPack snapshots. Default 24.

brainPackOutputDir.description: Output directory for the Git-safe agent-brainpack projection. Defaults to <workspace>/agent-brainpack.

brainPackGitEnabled.description: Opt-in flag for future BrainPack git automation. Default false; export can run without git.

brainPackIncludeRawTranscript.description: Raw transcript inclusion policy. Default never for Git-safe projection.

brainPackIncludeToolOutputs.description: Tool-output inclusion policy. Default never for Git-safe projection.

openClawNativeMode.description: Policy for OpenClaw native memory/dreaming features.

openClawNativeMemoryCoreMode.description: Optional feature-level override for OpenClaw memory-core.

openClawNativeActiveMemoryMode.description: Optional feature-level override for OpenClaw active-memory.

openClawNativeMemoryWikiMode.description: Optional feature-level override for OpenClaw memory-wiki.

openClawNativeDreamingMode.description: Optional feature-level override for OpenClaw dreaming.

graphEnabled.description: Enable optional graph enhancement lane. Default false.

ragEnabled.description: Enable optional RAG enhancement lane. Default false.

rerankEnabled.description: Enable optional rerank lane. Default false.

graphProvider.description: Graph provider. Default none. sqlite_graph is the local associative graph; sqlite_edges remains a compatibility alias; external requires a real configured runtime provider.

ragProvider.description: RAG provider. Default none. sqlite_vec is the preferred configured local vector path; brute_force is an explicit local fallback, never implicit.

rerankProvider.description: Rerank provider. Default none. deterministic is an explicit local orderer; llm/specialist/model/external require real provider wiring and never fall back implicitly.

embeddingEnabled.description: Enable embedding writes/jobs for RAG. Default false; RAG cannot run unless embeddings are explicitly configured.

embeddingProvider.description: Embedding generator. Default none keeps vector search off without a real embedding runtime. local_hash is explicit dev/test fallback; external is reserved for model-backed embeddings.

embeddingModel.description: Embedding model identifier used for vector index compatibility.

embeddingDimensions.description: Embedding dimensions used by local_hash or external providers.

embeddingAsync.description: Queue embedding jobs instead of making writes wait on optional RAG indexing.

embeddingJobMaxBatch.description: Maximum embedding jobs processed per indexing batch.

embeddingJobMaxRetries.description: Retry cap for optional embedding jobs.

vectorExtensionPath.description: Optional path to a SQLite vector extension. Missing or failing extension falls back when ragFallbackToBruteForce=true.

vectorExtensionEntryPoint.description: Optional SQLite extension entry point, for hosts that need an explicit sqlite3_*_init symbol.

vectorSearchMaxCandidates.description: Maximum RAG candidates returned from local vector search.

bruteForceVectorMaxRows.description: Maximum rows scanned by the TypeScript brute-force vector fallback.

ragFallbackToBruteForce.description: Explicitly allow sqlite_vec to fall back to local TypeScript cosine search if the vector extension is unavailable. Default false.

graphBuilderEnabled.description: Enable local graph edge construction. Graph read path can stay enabled independently.

graphBuilderProvider.description: Graph edge builder. Default none. deterministic is explicit local/dev construction; llm/external require real configured runtime providers and never masquerade as deterministic.

graphMaxDepth.description: Maximum graph traversal depth for associative recall.

graphMaxFanout.description: Maximum graph neighbors expanded per node.

graphMinConfidence.description: Minimum confidence for graph edges to participate in recall.

graphAllowedRelations.description: Allowed graph relation vocabulary for local associative graph edges.

graphCandidateLimit.description: Maximum graph candidates returned to the planner.

rerankModel.description: Optional model id for llm/specialist rerank providers.

rerankTimeoutMs.description: Timeout budget for optional model/external rerank.

rerankFallbackToDeterministic.description: Explicit fallback flag for model/external rerank. Default false; no deterministic fallback is implicit.

evidenceAnswerResolverEnabled.description: Enable final evidence-to-answer resolution. Default false; resolver cannot run without an explicit provider.

evidenceAnswerResolverProvider.description: EvidenceAnswerResolver provider. Default none. deterministic is explicit local resolution; llm/external require configured model/runtime and hard source validation.

evidenceAnswerResolverModel.description: Required model id for llm/external EvidenceAnswerResolver providers.

evidenceAnswerResolverTimeoutMs.description: Timeout budget for evidence-to-answer model resolution.

evidenceAnswerResolverFallbackToDetermin.description: Explicit fallback from llm/external EvidenceAnswerResolver to deterministic. Default false; no fallback is implicit.

featureIsolationMode.description: Optional-feature fault policy. isolate_optional keeps the main OMS path alive when RAG/Graph/Rerank fail.

heavyRetrievalPolicy.description: Global heavy-retrieval policy. planner_only keeps RAG/Graph/model rerank under LLMPlanner control; default planner_only.

ragPlannerPolicy.description: RAG lane scheduling policy. planner_only means semantic candidates are considered only when LLMPlanner routes them.

graphPlannerPolicy.description: Graph lane scheduling policy. planner_only means relation/provenance traversal is considered only when LLMPlanner routes it.

rerankPlannerPolicy.description: Rerank scheduling policy. candidate_overload_required forces deterministic rerank fallback whenever candidate pools are crowded or ambiguous.

candidateRerankThreshold.description: Total candidate count threshold that forces a rerank path before final context selection. Default 20.

laneCandidateRerankThreshold.description: Per-lane candidate count threshold that forces rerank. Default 10.

candidateAmbiguityMargin.description: Score-close ambiguity margin that forces rerank when top candidates are too close. Default 0.08.

strictModeRequiresRerankOnConflict.description: Require a rerank/expand/refuse path when strict or forensic mode has conflicting source-backed candidates. Default true.

maxEnhancementLatencyMs.description: Latency budget for optional enhancement lanes.

maxRerankCandidates.description: Maximum candidates sent to optional rerank providers.

emergencyBrake.description: Emergency stop: disables runtime capture, MemoryItem writes, auto recall, and knowledge promotion.

sqliteJournalMode.description: SQLite runtime journal mode. delete is conservative and default; wal improves concurrent read/write behavior when the host runtime supports it.
